zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon於1365年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，她的父親Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar21歲，母親Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar21歲。她於1380年2月2日與Rey Juan I de Aragón在法國奧其坦尼賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1431年7月3日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年66歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon于1365年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，她的父亲Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar21岁，母亲Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar21岁。她于1380年2月2日与Rey Juan I de Aragón在法国奧其坦尼賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1431年7月3日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年66岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon was born in 1365, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, was 21 and her mother, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, was 21. She married Rey Juan I de Aragón on 2 February 1380, in Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 July 1431, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 66, and was buried in Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon est née en 1365, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Juan I de Aragón le 2 février 1380, à Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1431, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon 1365 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar 21 und ihre Mutter Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar 21. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1380 in Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Frankreich Rey Juan I de Aragón geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1431 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon è nata il nel 1365 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Rey Juan I de Aragón il 2 febbraio 1380, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1431, nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragonが1365年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Barは21歳，母Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Barは21歳であった。1380年2月2日にフランスオクシタニーheラウルトモントペリールでRey Juan I de Aragónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1431年7月3日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナで66歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアターラゴナにて埋葬された。

ko.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: 스페인 카털니아 지로나 토로라 데 몽그i
ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon(이)가 1365년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1380년 2월 2일 프랑스 옥시탠이 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Rey Juan I de Aragón(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 7월 3일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon nasceu em 1365, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Juan I de Aragón em 2 de fevereiro de 1380, em Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1431, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: торроелла де монтгрi, гирона, каталуня, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon родилась в 1365 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Juan I de Aragón 2 февраля 1380 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, окситани, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 июля 1431 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Bar, Reine d'Aragon nació en 1365, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Rey Juan I de Aragón el 2 de febrero de 1380, en Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1431, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
